Final fixed-dictionary TRUE/FALSE labels

Exhaustive Gemma judgments over the final 256-concept dictionary for every held-out development object. These are the closed-set labels used by evaluation—not the open-set tags used while constructing the dictionary.

TRUEFALSE

Rows are held-out objects; columns are dictionary concepts in canonical order. Green = TRUE, charcoal = FALSE. Hover for the exact cell; click a row to inspect all 256 decisions.

Hover over a cell.
